dialogos.texto_en: Hmm...
(Even though they promised to support me,\n it's really my problem with Itsuki.)
(If Itsuki is having fun on this trip together with me \n but then acting like that...)
(At the very least, she's actively spending time with me\n and being a loving partner.)
(That's something to be happy about,\n something I must respond to.)
(She's making an effort to be proactive,\n and it's the worst if I don't reciprocate.)
I need to express my feelings too.
(But what should I do? Maybe a kiss, huh.\n To show Itsuki how much I care...)
(GUAAAAHH!\n Am I really thinking about something\n so utterly embarrassing right now?!)
(N-no, calm down. Nino said it herself,\n we haven't been acting like a couple,\n so I need to show her my feelings.)
(But it's not going to be easy,\n and I'm not going to just let it slide.\n First, I need to set the mood.)
(Should I...invite her to the lounge now?)
(But there will be people around.\n The night view might help set the mood...)
(That's it!\n There's an event that's PERFECT for setting the mood!)
I bet it would be even more beautiful\nwhen the sun's setting.
I saw a flyer earlier\nthat there are light shows at night.
(Yes, the event at Umikaji Terrace!)
All right, let's put this plan into action!
